summary: agency-health runx skill: read-only health bundle for one agency over a period. Reads C2 event stream (data-store read_events) + C7 ledger read by receipt id-stub only. Grades signals, seals health_verdict. Strictly read-only — refuses mutate framing.

observations.output: happy-path cases (healthy, degraded-stall) PASS 2/2 sealed receipts produced. Negative case (policy_denied) cannot be emitted by a graph/cli-tool runner in the local harness without a registered provider/authority.
status: sealed, verdict: healthy, folded.turns_total: 4, ledger_stubs.seal_rate: 0.95 — dogfood run exercises the real read-only health fold end to end.
status: sealed, verdict: degraded, folded.turns_total: 7, intervention_findings: [improve-skill:retry-policy, ops-desk:stale-turn-alert] — second dogfood run proves the degraded grading path.
refused: read_only_contract — no mutation performed; appends nothing, sends nothing, executes nothing.
remote publish rejected: needs at least 1 stop/negative case (known issue #287 harness limitation). Local publish (default) succeeded; raw GitHub tree used as public_url fallback (Mitigation A).

observations.note: CI scafld verify fails only due to fork-PR pull_request_target checkout block (repo policy), not skill defect. Harness passes locally; local publish succeeded.
